__comment: HeatPump Hero — Multi-year SCOP/MAZ dashboard. Requires InfluxDB v2 datasource and at least 1 month of data from the HA InfluxDB integration. Adjust bucket variable to match your setup.

targets.query:
thermal = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1y), stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "thermal_kwh"}))

electrical = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1y), stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "electrical_kwh"}))

join(tables: {t: thermal, e: electrical}, on: ["_stop"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_e > 0.0 then r._value_t / r._value_e else 0.0, _field: "SCOP (year to date)"}))

import "date"

prevYearStart = date.truncate(t: date.sub(d: 1y, from: now()), unit: 1y)
prevYearEnd   = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1y)

thermal = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: prevYearStart, stop: prevYearEnd)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)

electrical = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: prevYearStart, stop: prevYearEnd)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)

join(tables: {t: thermal, e: electrical}, on: ["_stop"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_e > 0.0 then r._value_t / r._value_e else 0.0, _field: "SCOP previous year"}))

thermal = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -100y, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)

electrical = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -100y, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)

join(tables: {t: thermal, e: electrical}, on: ["_stop"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_e > 0.0 then r._value_t / r._value_e else 0.0, _field: "SCOP lifetime"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1y), stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Thermal kWh (year)"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1y), stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> integral(unit: 1h)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Electrical kWh (year)"}))

thermal = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))

electrical = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))

join(tables: {t: thermal, e: electrical}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_e > 0.0 then r._value_t / r._value_e else 0.0, _field: "COP"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0, _field: "Thermal"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0, _field: "Electrical"}))

thermal = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))

electrical = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_electrical_energy_active" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: integral, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 3600.0}))

join(tables: {t: thermal, e: electrical}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value_e > 0.0 then r._value_t / r._value_e else 0.0, _field: "COP daily"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outdoor_temp" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Outdoor T° (daily avg)"}))

title: HeatPump Hero — Efficiency (SCOP / MAZ)
